name: VeloProfitabilityInsight
description: Calculated profitability and ROI analysis for specific income categories and lanes.

owner_user_id.description: The ID of the user who owns this insight

owner_email.description: The email of the user who owns this insight

source_department.description: Primary department associated with this category

total_earned.description: Total amount earned in this category

total_minutes.description: Estimated total minutes spent on tasks in this category

roi_score.description: Deterministic ROI score (0-100) based on profit, volume, and confidence

completed_count.description: Number of completed missions or tasks

autopilot_transaction_count.description: Number of income transactions involving Autopilot

refund_or_loss_total.description: Total value of refunds, chargebacks, or losses

best_platforms.description: List of top performing platforms in this category

representative_mission_ids.description: Sample mission IDs used for calculation

representative_transaction_ids.description: Sample transaction IDs used for calculation

recommendation.description: Short user-facing recommendation based on data

autopilot_priority.description: Autopilot priority level (deprioritize, normal, prioritize, strongly_prioritize)

calculated_at.description: ISO timestamp of when this insight was last calculated
